code.description: A unique number of the brand.
A unique number of the brand category.

createLabelsOnlyForItemsInStockWithinLas.description: Parameter representing whether to create labels only for items in stock within last number of days

enableEan20Conversion.description: Parameter representing whether conversion to EAN20 should be enabled during import

generateExternalItemNo.description: Based on this flag external item number is generated or not (editible in UI).

gtinPrefix.description: Parameter representing what GTIN prefix would you like to have for new items.

hiddenAttributes.description: Configuration for hidden item and price attributes

isCheckDigitControlEnabled.description: Flag representing whether check digit control is enabled for GTINs

itemImageThumbnailUrlTemplate.description: Parameter representing what is the source of thumbnails for items.

itemImageUrlTemplate.description: Parameter representing what is the source of images for items.

itemsUpdateMode.description: Parameter representing what should be a default value for ‘Save’ modal in item details view.

manageStoreAssortment.description: Parameter representing whether managing store assortment should be enabled

priceCalculatorFallbackPercentDecimal.description: Parameter representing what value should be used in price calculation when the calculation gets an out of range value, or a denominator is zero.

priceLocalTimeZoneIana.description:
A iana time zone, e.g. 'Europe/Oslo'.
https://www.iana.org/time-zones

priceLocalTimeZoneWindows.description:
A windows time zone id, e.g. 'W. Europe Standard Time'
https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/windows-hardware/manufacture/desktop/default-time-zones

pricerClientId.description: Used for authentication with pricer client api

pricerClientSecret.description: Used for authentication with pricer client api

pricerUrl.description: Parameter representing url to pricer client api

urlTemplateForLabelQRCode.description: URL base for generating QR code on labels

useAssortmentPerProfile.description:
Flag representing whether tenant uses assortment per profile or not.
When parameter UsePlanningCodes is enabled, the value of the parameter UseAssortmentPerProfile does not have any impact on the system.

useModelItems.description: Flag representing whether tenant uses model or non-model items.

usePlanningCodes.description: Flag representing whether tenant uses planning codes or not.

useValuesPerProfile.description: Flag representing whether tenant uses values per profile for Warranty Type and ID requirement or not.

code.description: A unique code of the collection.

name.description: A unique name of the color.

number.description: A unique name of the number.

customDeliveryDate.description: If true, the store can override the date.
If true, the store can override the date.
If true, the store can override the date.

errors.description:
This field is not serialized to JSON.
Mapping methods use it to create a query which can be translated to SQL.
Use ItemService.Api.Contracts.PricatImport.ImportItem.ErrorList  property to obtain errors.

warnings.description:
This field is not serialized to JSON.
Mapping methods use it to create a query which can be translated to SQL.
Use ItemService.Api.Contracts.PricatImport.ImportItem.WarningList  property to obtain errors.

code.description: A unique code of the marketing exclusivity.
A unique number of the procurement rule.
A unique code of the replenishment code.
A unique number of the report category.

name.description: A unique name of the color.

number.description: A unique name of the number.

name.description: A unique name of the season.
A unique name of the season.
A unique name of the size.

order.description: A value by which the sizes are sorted by default. Doesn't have to be unique.

name.description: A unique name of the size template.
A unique name of the size template.

order.description: A value by which the sizes are sorted by default. Doesn't have to be unique.
A value by which the sizes are sorted by default. Doesn't have to be unique.

collectionCount.description: Number of entries in collection after upsert

skipped.description: Number of entries which could not be added/deleted

errorCode.description: Validator which caused the error to happen, e.g. 'GreaterThanValidator'

message.description: A developer friendly message about the error.

propertyName.description: The name of the property that caused a validation error.

message.description: A developer friendly message about why the request was not processed.

info.description:
# Internal usage only

ItemService is an API for item maintenance.
Aside from managing items, it can be used for maintenance of all kinds of registers that are connected to items (e.g. colors, sizes, seasons etc.).

## Health check

[Click](/hc) to see health check status.
info.title: Item API
